message:
test(fcp-core): pin SignedManifest envelope serde + sign/verify (flywheel_connectors-c8hb0)

Bead asks for SignedPackageCatalog Display + JSON+CBOR roundtrip.
fcp-core has no type literally named SignedPackageCatalog; the
closest analogue is SignedManifest<T> (connector_artifacts.rs:237) —
the canonical signed envelope wrapping any package payload
(ConnectorManifestObject, ConnectorBinaryObject,
ConnectorBinarySymbolSet). LocalRegistryCatalog lives in
fcp-registry, not fcp-core. None of these implement Display.

Coverage:
- Stable canonical schema IDs for SignedManifest envelope and the
  three package-artifact payload kinds
- Sign + verify round-trip; rejection under unrelated key
- canonical_payload_bytes deterministic across calls; differs across
  payload contents (and so do signatures)
- JSON round-trip preserves all envelope fields (payload_schema,
  payload, signer_kid, signature) for both manifest and binary
  payloads, signature still verifies after round-trip
- CBOR round-trip preserves the same fields, signature still verifies
- to_canonical_bytes / from_canonical_bytes round-trip via the
  envelope schema, deterministic
- ManifestSignature per-variant JSON form pinned (Ed25519, RsaPss,
  EcdsaP256 — bare PascalCase tokens since no rename_all is set) and
  CBOR round-trip per variant
- Tampering detection: payload byte flip after round-trip fails
  verify; zeroed signature fails verify
- ConnectorBinarySymbolSet (the third package-artifact kind)
  JSON+CBOR round-trip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
